title: Spotted Dick with Fresh Fruits
description: A classic British dessert made with suet and spices, served with a variety of fresh fruits.

ingredients.name: Spotted Dick Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most British import stores

ingredients.name: Fresh Fruits
ingredients.notes: Variety of your choice, such as strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries

instructions: Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan with butter.
In a large mixing bowl, combine Spotted Dick Mix, brown sugar, eggs, milk, vanilla extract, and salt.
Pour the mixture into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm or at room temperature with fresh fruits.
